task_completion.description: Verify the input countries shapefile is loaded into the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel shows 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' as an active layer and the map canvas displays the global country polygons.

task_completion.description: Verify the Dissolve tool dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A geoprocessing dialog box titled 'Dissolve' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Dissolve tool is configured to use the 'CONTINENT' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Dissolve tool dialog, the 'Dissolve field(s)' parameter is explicitly set to 'CONTINENT'.

task_completion.description: Verify the dissolve operation completes and creates a new layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer (e.g., 'Dissolved') appears in the layers panel, and the map canvas shows merged continent polygons (internal country borders are removed).

task_completion.description: Verify the dissolved layer is exported as a GeoJSON file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as' or 'Export' dialog shows the format set to 'GeoJSON' and the file name/path set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/continents_dissolved.geojson', or a success message confirms this exact file was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS software's graphical interface to perform the dissolve and export, rather than running terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GIS software menus, geoprocessing dialogs, and layer panels, rather than terminal windows executing commands like 'ogr2ogr'.

integrity.description: The map canvas displays actual geographic data rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main window shows a map of the world being visually rendered, confirming the agent is interacting with real spatial data.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GIS software by manually creating or pasting content into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open with GeoJSON content; the output must be generated via the GIS export dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp. Output file: /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/continents_dissolved.geojson. Dissolve field: CONTINENT. The resulting dissolved layer should have between 5 and 9 features (continents).
